authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version from 1.3.5.RELEASE to 2.3.0.RELEASE to support Java 11.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.x does not support Java 11; compilation and runtime will fail due to removed internal APIs and module system incompatibilities.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will default to Java 8 if not specified, causing class files incompatible with JDK 11 runtime expectations or vice-versa depending on build config.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud BOM version from Brixton.RELEASE to Hoxton.SR4 to align with Spring Boot 2.3.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Brixton is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.x; dependency resolution will fail or result in runtime classpath conflicts.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated spring-cloud-starter-oauth2 with spring-security-oauth2-autoconfigure and spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: spring-cloud-starter-oauth2 is removed in Spring Cloud Hoxton; compilation will fail due to missing classes.
